description: Use this API to return three-winding transformer complex values for winding connected to bus IBUS. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = wnddt2(ibus, jbus, kbus, ickt, string)
python_syntax: ierr, cmpval = wnddt2(ibus, jbus, kbus, ickt, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the transformer winding quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Same as ‘FLOW’ units determined by power output option.

error_codes.description: Bus not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Three-winding transformer not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Error fetching transformer data; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Sequence data not in case for ‘STRING’ = ‘RXZ’; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Branch out of service; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ of 0.0 or ‘CMPVAL’ of (0.0,0.0) returned.
